items.title: Asian Stocks to Fall a Second Day on Tech Worries: Markets Wrap
items.content: Stocks in Asia were set to decline for a second session as investors continued to rotate out of technology shares on concerns that the artificial intelligence-fueled rally has run ahead of itself.
items.contentSnippet: Stocks in Asia were set to decline for a second session as investors continued to rotate out of technology shares on concerns that the artificial intelligence-fueled rally has run ahead of itself.
items.creator: Toby Alder

summaries.zh: 亚洲股市连续第二天下跌，投资者因担忧人工智能驱动的反弹已过度膨胀，继续抛售科技股。市场情绪受科技板块影响，整体呈现调整态势。
summaries.en: Asian stocks are expected to fall for a second day as investors exit technology shares due to concerns that the AI-driven rally has peaked. The market decline reflects ongoing rotation away from tech stocks amid fears of overvaluation.

items.summary: 亚洲股市连续第二天下跌，投资者因担忧人工智能驱动的反弹已过度膨胀，继续抛售科技股。市场情绪受科技板块影响，整体呈现调整态势。

items.title: Dow Average Hits Peak as Jobs Ease Fed-Hike Worry: Markets Wrap
items.content: A sharp slowdown in the US jobs market spurred gains in most stocks on Wall Street amid speculation the Federal Reserve won’t be forced to raise interest rates any time soon.
items.contentSnippet: A sharp slowdown in the US jobs market spurred gains in most stocks on Wall Street amid speculation the Federal Reserve won’t be forced to raise interest rates any time soon.
items.creator: Rita Nazareth

summaries.zh: 亚洲股市周四将下跌，因美国芯片股抛售情绪受挫，投资者同时评估美联储主席鲍威尔关于通胀的新言论。
summaries.en: Asian stocks are expected to decline Thursday following a sell-off in U.S. chipmakers, as investors react to Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh's comments on inflation. Oil prices also fell, contributing to market weakness. The drop reflects concerns about sector-specific volatility and broader economic sentiment.

items.summary: 亚洲股市周四将下跌，因美国芯片股抛售情绪受挫，投资者同时评估美联储主席鲍威尔关于通胀的新言论。

items.title: Consumers Going to Feel 'Less Flush with Cash': Cisar
items.content: Winnie Cisar, global head of credit strategy at CreditSights, and Matt Brill, head of North American investment grade credit at Invesco, join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Winnie Cisar, global head of credit strategy at CreditSights, and Matt Brill, head of North American investment grade credit at Invesco, join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh:
标题：消费者将感到“现金减少”：Cisar

内容：CreditSights全球信贷策略主管Winnie Cisar和Invesco北美投资级信贷主管Matt Brill在“Bloomberg Real Yield”节目上表示，消费者将面临现金流紧张。节目由Scarlet Fu主持。（信息来源：彭博）
summaries.en: Winnie Cisar, global head of credit strategy at CreditSights, and Matt Brill, head of North American investment grade credit at Invesco, discussed on "Bloomberg Real Yield" that consumers are expected to have less disposable income. The conversation highlighted concerns about reduced cash availability among consumers, though specific details on causes or impacts were not provided. The discussion was part of a broader analysis of credit trends. (Word count: 50)

items.summary:
标题：消费者将感到“现金减少”：Cisar

内容：CreditSights全球信贷策略主管Winnie Cisar和Invesco北美投资级信贷主管Matt Brill在“Bloomberg Real Yield”节目上表示，消费者将面临现金流紧张。节目由Scarlet Fu主持。（信息来源：彭博）

items.title: Fourth of July Cookout Costs Rise 4% Says Stew Leonard's CEO
items.content: Stew Leonard Jr., President and CEO of Stew Leonard's grocery stores, discussed the recent 4% increase in the average cost of an Independence Day meal for 10, now $73.82. He emphasized that despite the rise, the per-person cost remains reasonable compared to dining out. The primary driver of the price increase is beef, with meat prices rising from $2.50 to $2.75 due to a 75-year low in cattle herd sizes and strong demand for protein. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Stew Leonard Jr., President and CEO of Stew Leonard's grocery stores, discussed the recent 4% increase in the average cost of an Independence Day meal for 10, now $73.82. He emphasized that despite the rise, the per-person cost remains reasonable compared to dining out. The primary driver of the price increase is beef, with meat prices rising from $2.50 to $2.75 due to a 75-year low in cattle herd sizes and strong demand for protein. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 斯图·刘易斯超市总裁兼首席执行官斯图·刘易斯·小表示，独立日10人聚餐平均成本上涨4%，达73.82美元。尽管价格上涨，但人均成本仍低于外出就餐。主要原因是牛肉价格上涨，从2.50美元涨至2.75美元，因牛群规模降至75年低点且蛋白质需求强劲。该信息来源于彭博社。
summaries.en: Stew Leonard Jr., CEO of Stew Leonard's, reported a 4% increase in the average Fourth of July cookout cost for 10 people to $73.82. He noted the per-person cost is still lower than dining out. Beef prices drove the rise, increasing from $2.50 to $2.75 per pound due to a 75-year low in cattle herd sizes and high protein demand. The statement was made during an interview on "The Close" with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: 斯图·刘易斯超市总裁兼首席执行官斯图·刘易斯·小表示，独立日10人聚餐平均成本上涨4%，达73.82美元。尽管价格上涨，但人均成本仍低于外出就餐。主要原因是牛肉价格上涨，从2.50美元涨至2.75美元，因牛群规模降至75年低点且蛋白质需求强劲。该信息来源于彭博社。

items.title: Canada, Philippines Agree to Sign Trade Deal This Year, Grow Defense Ties
items.content: Canada and the Philippines plan to finalize a free trade agreement this year, and signed agreements to deepen cooperation on energy, defense, labor and migration, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Thursday.
items.contentSnippet: Canada and the Philippines plan to finalize a free trade agreement this year, and signed agreements to deepen cooperation on energy, defense, labor and migration, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Thursday.
items.creator: Cliff Harvey Venzon, Brian Platt, Thomas Seal

summaries.zh: 加拿大和菲律宾计划今年完成自由贸易协定，并签署协议深化能源、国防、劳工和移民合作。总理马克·卡尼周四表示，双方已达成共识。
summaries.en: Canada and the Philippines aim to finalize a free trade agreement this year. Both countries have signed agreements to enhance cooperation in energy, defense, labor, and migration, as announced by Prime Minister Mark Carney.

items.summary: 加拿大和菲律宾计划今年完成自由贸易协定，并签署协议深化能源、国防、劳工和移民合作。总理马克·卡尼周四表示，双方已达成共识。

items.title: World Cup Muni Spending An Accelerator: Kleinman
items.content: Margot Kleinman, head of municipal research & portfolio manager at Nuveen, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Municipal bonds helped 11 US World Cup Host Cities fund upgrades to transportation hubs, airports, and enhance security. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Margot Kleinman, head of municipal research & portfolio manager at Nuveen, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Municipal bonds helped 11 US World Cup Host Cities fund upgrades to transportation hubs, airports, and enhance security. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 纽汶市政研究主管Margot Kleinman在“彭博真实收益率”节目中表示，市政债券加速了美国11个世界杯主办城市的支出。这些债券为城市提供了资金，用于升级交通枢纽、机场和增强安保。来源：彭博。
summaries.en: Margot Kleinman, head of municipal research and portfolio manager at Nuveen, discusses on "Bloomberg Real Yield" how municipal bonds funded infrastructure upgrades in 11 US World Cup host cities, including transportation hubs, airports, and security enhancements. (Word count: 50)

items.title: Private Credit Is Betting on Consumer Debt at a Precarious Time
items.content: Bloomberg's Rene Ismail joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The private credit industry was dubbed “shadow banking” as it took business away from traditional lenders. Buy Now, Pay Later companies have been referred to as hawking “phantom debt” that falls outside Wall Street’s typical tracking methods. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Bloomberg's Rene Ismail joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The private credit industry was dubbed “shadow banking” as it took business away from traditional lenders. Buy Now, Pay Later companies have been referred to as hawking “phantom debt” that falls outside Wall Street’s typical tracking methods. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 私人信贷行业在当前脆弱时期押注消费者债务。该行业曾被称为“影子银行”，因其业务抢占了传统金融机构的市场份额。分期付款公司被指推销游离于华尔街常规追踪之外的“幽灵债务”。（来源：彭博）
summaries.en: Private credit firms are increasingly focusing on consumer debt, a risky strategy given current economic conditions. Once labeled "shadow banking," this sector, including Buy Now, Pay Later companies, operates outside traditional financial oversight, dealing with "phantom debt" not tracked by Wall Street. (Word count: 50)

items.summary: 私人信贷行业在当前脆弱时期押注消费者债务。该行业曾被称为“影子银行”，因其业务抢占了传统金融机构的市场份额。分期付款公司被指推销游离于华尔街常规追踪之外的“幽灵债务”。（来源：彭博）

items.title: Families Look For Affordable Summer Fun Amid Cost Crunch
items.content: Sky Zone CEO Dave Hoffman said that the trampoline park company is looking to help parents give their kids the summer they deserve with membership deals as families feel squeezed by higher prices. Hoffman said that his company's thesis is about prioritizing 'active and social play' for kids as they navigate a very online world post covid.  (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Sky Zone CEO Dave Hoffman said that the trampoline park company is looking to help parents give their kids the summer they deserve with membership deals as families feel squeezed by higher prices. Hoffman said that his company's thesis is about prioritizing 'active and social play' for kids as they navigate a very online world post covid.  (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 天区跳伞公园CEO戴夫·霍夫曼表示，该公司正通过会员优惠活动，帮助家长在物价上涨的压力下，为孩子提供他们应得的夏日乐趣。霍夫曼称，公司理念是让孩子们在疫情后高度数字化的世界中，优先享受“积极和社交的玩耍”。（信息来源：彭博）
summaries.en: Sky Zone is offering membership deals to help families afford summer activities amid rising costs. CEO Dave Hoffman emphasized the importance of "active and social play" for children in the post-COVID era. The company aims to provide affordable summer fun as families deal with economic pressure.

items.summary: 天区跳伞公园CEO戴夫·霍夫曼表示，该公司正通过会员优惠活动，帮助家长在物价上涨的压力下，为孩子提供他们应得的夏日乐趣。霍夫曼称，公司理念是让孩子们在疫情后高度数字化的世界中，优先享受“积极和社交的玩耍”。（信息来源：彭博）

items.title: South Korea Opens 24-Hour Won Trading at a Fraught Moment
items.content: Deep inside a government complex in Sejong, about two hours from Seoul, a room known as “the box” is ground zero for South Korea’s currency anxieties.
items.contentSnippet: Deep inside a government complex in Sejong, about two hours from Seoul, a room known as “the box” is ground zero for South Korea’s currency anxieties.
items.creator: Hooyeon Kim, Heesu Lee, Susie Kang

summaries.zh: 韩国在首尔附近Sejong政府大楼内设立“货币处理中心”，以应对当前对韩元汇率的担忧。该中心24小时运作，旨在稳定货币市场，缓解当前紧张局势。
summaries.en: South Korea has opened 24-hour Won trading amid heightened currency concerns. A room in Sejong, near Seoul, serves as the central hub for managing these anxieties. The move reflects the country's focus on stabilizing its currency during a challenging period.

items.summary: 韩国在首尔附近Sejong政府大楼内设立“货币处理中心”，以应对当前对韩元汇率的担忧。该中心24小时运作，旨在稳定货币市场，缓解当前紧张局势。

items.title: World’s Worst-Performing Exchange ASX Bets on Outsider for Pivot
items.content: When Anthony Attia takes the helm at Australia’s ASX Ltd., the world’s worst-performing stock exchange operator, he’ll need to launch straight into a battle to win over regulators and investors.
items.contentSnippet: When Anthony Attia takes the helm at Australia’s ASX Ltd., the world’s worst-performing stock exchange operator, he’ll need to launch straight into a battle to win over regulators and investors.
items.creator: Carmeli Argana, Richard Henderson

summaries.zh: 澳大利亚表现最差的证券交易所ASX Ltd. 将任命Anthony Attia为新任负责人，以寻求转折点。Attia上任后将面临赢得监管机构和投资者的信任的挑战。
summaries.en: Anthony Attia is set to lead Australia’s ASX Ltd., the world’s worst-performing stock exchange, aiming to regain trust from regulators and investors. His appointment marks a potential pivot for the struggling exchange as it seeks to improve performance and credibility in the market.

items.summary: 澳大利亚表现最差的证券交易所ASX Ltd. 将任命Anthony Attia为新任负责人，以寻求转折点。Attia上任后将面临赢得监管机构和投资者的信任的挑战。

items.title: Blue Owl Imposes Redemption Caps Again
items.content:
Bloomberg's Sinead Cruise joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." For the second straight quarter, two Blue Owl Capital private credit funds were hit with the industry’s largest redemption requests, forcing the manager to again cap withdrawals.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet:
Bloomberg's Sinead Cruise joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." For the second straight quarter, two Blue Owl Capital private credit funds were hit with the industry’s largest redemption requests, forcing the manager to again cap withdrawals.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 蓝鹰资本两只私募信贷基金连续第二季度面临行业最大规模的赎回请求，迫使管理人再次限制撤资。此消息源自彭博社的Sinead Cruise与Scarlet Fu在“彭博真实收益率”节目中的讨论。
summaries.en: Blue Owl Capital's two private credit funds faced the industry's largest redemption requests for the second consecutive quarter, prompting the firm to impose withdrawal caps. Bloomberg's Sinead Cruise discussed this on "Bloomberg Real Yield" with Scarlet Fu. The caps were necessary to manage the outflows.

items.summary: 蓝鹰资本两只私募信贷基金连续第二季度面临行业最大规模的赎回请求，迫使管理人再次限制撤资。此消息源自彭博社的Sinead Cruise与Scarlet Fu在“彭博真实收益率”节目中的讨论。

items.title: ‘Taylor Swift Tax’ Stirs Bad Blood With Rhode Island Homeowners
items.content: Bloomberg News Boston money and power reporter Greg Ryan said that a Rhode Island tax increase on second homes is not just impacting the wealthiest residents like Taylor Swift, but that many residents with family properties worry about the impact on their finances. The Rhode Island tax comes as some other cities and states move to tax second homes at a higher rate, like the pied-a-terre tax proposed in New York City by Mayor Zohran Mamdani.  (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Bloomberg News Boston money and power reporter Greg Ryan said that a Rhode Island tax increase on second homes is not just impacting the wealthiest residents like Taylor Swift, but that many residents with family properties worry about the impact on their finances. The Rhode Island tax comes as some other cities and states move to tax second homes at a higher rate, like the pied-a-terre tax proposed in New York City by Mayor Zohran Mamdani.  (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 罗德岛州对第二居所的税收增加引发了争议，不仅影响了像泰勒·斯威夫特这样的富裕居民，也使许多拥有家庭房产的居民担心财务影响。此举与其他城市和州类似，例如纽约市市长提出的第二居所高税率政策。据彭博社报道，该税收政策引发了不少居民的不满。
summaries.en: A Rhode Island tax increase on second homes has drawn criticism, with Bloomberg reporter Greg Ryan noting it affects residents beyond the wealthy, like Taylor Swift, and concerns many with family properties. The move aligns with other cities and states, such as New York City's proposed pied-a-terre tax, which also targets second homes at higher rates.

items.summary: 罗德岛州对第二居所的税收增加引发了争议，不仅影响了像泰勒·斯威夫特这样的富裕居民，也使许多拥有家庭房产的居民担心财务影响。此举与其他城市和州类似，例如纽约市市长提出的第二居所高税率政策。据彭博社报道，该税收政策引发了不少居民的不满。

items.title: US Stocks Erase Jobs Report-Related Gains as Semis Pull Back
items.content: US equities finished the holiday-shortened week little changed, erasing their earlier advance as technology stocks trailed the S&P 500 Index for a second-straight day.
items.contentSnippet: US equities finished the holiday-shortened week little changed, erasing their earlier advance as technology stocks trailed the S&P 500 Index for a second-straight day.

summaries.en: US stocks advanced as job growth fell short of expectations, reducing traders' expectations of an early Federal Reserve interest rate hike.

items.title: TD Securities: Data Now Guiding Central Bank Rate Paths
items.content: Pooja Kumra, Senior European and UK Rates Strategist at TD Securities, discussed the recent comments from Federal Reserve official Kevin Warsh and their implications for market expectations. Kumra noted that while Warsh acknowledged easing inflation and narrowing inflation expectations, his remarks were less hawkish than those from the June Fed meeting. She highlighted the absence of forward rate guidance from the Fed and other central banks, emphasizing that market data and conditions will now primarily drive rate decisions. With the upcoming release of the Fed minutes, Kumra expressed interest in insights on internal Fed deliberations. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Pooja Kumra, Senior European and UK Rates Strategist at TD Securities, discussed the recent comments from Federal Reserve official Kevin Warsh and their implications for market expectations. Kumra noted that while Warsh acknowledged easing inflation and narrowing inflation expectations, his remarks were less hawkish than those from the June Fed meeting. She highlighted the absence of forward rate guidance from the Fed and other central banks, emphasizing that market data and conditions will now primarily drive rate decisions. With the upcoming release of the Fed minutes, Kumra expressed interest in insights on internal Fed deliberations. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: TD Securities首席欧洲及英国利率策略师Pooja Kumra分析，美联储官员Kevin Warsh近期表态虽承认通胀放缓和预期趋稳，但较6月Fed会议的鹰派言论缓和。她指出Fed及其他央行缺乏前瞻指引，未来货币政策将主要受市场数据与条件驱动。Kumra关注即将发布的Fed会议纪要，以了解内部讨论细节。（源自彭博）
summaries.en: TD Securities' Pooja Kumra notes Federal Reserve official Kevin Warsh's comments on easing inflation were less hawkish than June Fed remarks. She highlights the lack of forward rate guidance from central banks, stating market data will now guide rate decisions. Kumra looks forward to Fed minutes for insights on internal deliberations. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: TD Securities首席欧洲及英国利率策略师Pooja Kumra分析，美联储官员Kevin Warsh近期表态虽承认通胀放缓和预期趋稳，但较6月Fed会议的鹰派言论缓和。她指出Fed及其他央行缺乏前瞻指引，未来货币政策将主要受市场数据与条件驱动。Kumra关注即将发布的Fed会议纪要，以了解内部讨论细节。（源自彭博）

items.title: Wall Street Bets Rallying Markets Will Absorb Every Market Blow
items.content: Wall Street is kicking off the second half of 2026 with fresh conviction: shrugging off one shock after another, markets are set to grind even higher.
items.contentSnippet: Wall Street is kicking off the second half of 2026 with fresh conviction: shrugging off one shock after another, markets are set to grind even higher.
items.creator: Isabelle Lee

summaries.zh: 华尔街在2026年下半年展现出新信心，市场正以“无视冲击”的姿态持续上涨。尽管接连遭遇冲击，市场仍将稳步攀升。
summaries.en: Wall Street enters 2026 with confidence, expecting markets to absorb shocks and continue rising. The article highlights a resilient market outlook, as investors remain unfazed by recent disruptions, setting the stage for further gains. The focus is on the market's ability to withstand volatility and maintain upward momentum.

items.summary: 华尔街在2026年下半年展现出新信心，市场正以“无视冲击”的姿态持续上涨。尽管接连遭遇冲击，市场仍将稳步攀升。

items.title: Kochugovindan: Expect Fed to Hold Rates For Rest of 2026
items.content: The heads of major central banks discussed changing the inflation outlook at the ECB's annual forum in Portugal. Fed chair Kevin Warsh said price risks have come down in recent weeks, and that his goal remains to bring inflation back to the US central bank's 2% target. Sree Kochugovindan, Senior Research Economist at Aberdeen Investments, spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the inflation gauge. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: The heads of major central banks discussed changing the inflation outlook at the ECB's annual forum in Portugal. Fed chair Kevin Warsh said price risks have come down in recent weeks, and that his goal remains to bring inflation back to the US central bank's 2% target. Sree Kochugovindan, Senior Research Economist at Aberdeen Investments, spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the inflation gauge. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 科赫乌金丹表示，预计美联储将在2026年剩余时间内维持利率不变。美联储主席沃什称，近期价格风险有所下降，目标仍是将通胀降至2%目标水平。欧洲央行年度论坛上，主要央行行长讨论了通胀前景变化。（源自彭博社）
summaries.en: Kochugovindan, a senior research economist at Aberdeen Investments, expects the Federal Reserve to hold interest rates steady for the rest of 2026. This outlook was discussed during the ECB's annual forum in Portugal, where Fed Chair Kevin Warsh noted that price risks have decreased, with the goal of bringing inflation back to the US central bank's 2% target. The discussion focused on inflation trends and central bank policies.

items.summary: 科赫乌金丹表示，预计美联储将在2026年剩余时间内维持利率不变。美联储主席沃什称，近期价格风险有所下降，目标仍是将通胀降至2%目标水平。欧洲央行年度论坛上，主要央行行长讨论了通胀前景变化。（源自彭博社）

items.title: Real Yield 7/2/2026
items.content: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: JPMorgan Asset Management Fixed Income Portfolio Manager Kelsey Berro, Firm's Head of Cross-Asset Market Strategy Chief Investment Office Matthew Diczok, CreditSights Global Head of Credit Strategy Winnie Cisar, Invesco Head of IG Credit of North America Matt Brill, and Nuveen Head of Municipal Research & Portfolio Manager Margot Kleinman. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: JPMorgan Asset Management Fixed Income Portfolio Manager Kelsey Berro, Firm's Head of Cross-Asset Market Strategy Chief Investment Office Matthew Diczok, CreditSights Global Head of Credit Strategy Winnie Cisar, Invesco Head of IG Credit of North America Matt Brill, and Nuveen Head of Municipal Research & Portfolio Manager Margot Kleinman. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 《彭博实际收益率》7/2/2026报道市场动态。本期嘉宾包括摩根大通固定收益投资组合经理Kelsey Berro、公司跨资产市场战略首席投资官Matthew Diczok、CreditSights全球信用策略主管Winnie Cisar、景顺北美投资级信用主管Matt Brill以及Nuveen市政研究及投资组合经理Margot Kleinman。(信息来源：彭博)
summaries.en: "Bloomberg Real Yield" features discussions with experts on market-moving news. Guests include JPMorgan's Kelsey Berro (Fixed Income Portfolio Manager), Matthew Diczok (Chief Investment Office), Winnie Cisar (CreditSights Global Head of Credit Strategy), Matt Brill (Invesco Head of IG Credit of North America), and Margot Kleinman (Nuveen Head of Municipal Research & Portfolio Manager). The session covers insights from these industry leaders. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: 《彭博实际收益率》7/2/2026报道市场动态。本期嘉宾包括摩根大通固定收益投资组合经理Kelsey Berro、公司跨资产市场战略首席投资官Matthew Diczok、CreditSights全球信用策略主管Winnie Cisar、景顺北美投资级信用主管Matt Brill以及Nuveen市政研究及投资组合经理Margot Kleinman。(信息来源：彭博)

items.title: Spotify Challenges Prediction Markets After Song Chart Rigging
items.content: Spotify has asked Kalshi and Polymarket to remove its logo and clarify that neither company has a partnership with the streaming service after it identified users manipulating rankings that are tied to prediction market bets.
items.contentSnippet: Spotify has asked Kalshi and Polymarket to remove its logo and clarify that neither company has a partnership with the streaming service after it identified users manipulating rankings that are tied to prediction market bets.
items.creator: Denitsa Tsekova

summaries.zh: Spotify指控预测市场用户操纵与其歌曲排行榜相关的投注排名，已要求Kalshi和Polymarket移除其标志并澄清双方无合作关系。此举旨在应对所谓的“歌曲排行榜舞弊”问题。
summaries.en: Spotify has challenged prediction markets, specifically Kalshi and Polymarket, over song chart manipulation. The company requested that these platforms remove its logo and clarify there is no partnership between them. This action follows Spotify's discovery that users were manipulating rankings linked to prediction market bets. The move aims to address the issue of rigged charts tied to these markets.

items.summary: Spotify指控预测市场用户操纵与其歌曲排行榜相关的投注排名，已要求Kalshi和Polymarket移除其标志并澄清双方无合作关系。此举旨在应对所谓的“歌曲排行榜舞弊”问题。

items.title: Screwworm's Return to the US Sets up Yearslong Fight
items.content: For the first time in about fifty years, the New World screwworm is back in US livestock. Bloomberg's Ilena Peng explains how the parasitic fly will affect beef prices and how the USDA is responding. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: For the first time in about fifty years, the New World screwworm is back in US livestock. Bloomberg's Ilena Peng explains how the parasitic fly will affect beef prices and how the USDA is responding. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 五十年来，新大陆螺虫首次在美国牲畜中回归。这种寄生虫可能影响牛肉价格，美国农业部正在应对。
summaries.en: The New World screwworm has returned to U.S. livestock for the first time in about 50 years, posing a threat to cattle and potentially raising beef prices. The USDA is responding to the parasitic fly, which can kill livestock by burrowing into their flesh. The situation will require a long-term effort to eradicate. (Word count: 50)

items.summary: 五十年来，新大陆螺虫首次在美国牲畜中回归。这种寄生虫可能影响牛肉价格，美国农业部正在应对。

items.title: Gold Jumps After Soft US Job Numbers Ease Fed Rate Hike Fears
items.content: Gold climbed after weak US job numbers eased fears that the Federal Reserve may raise interest rates this year to tackle inflation.
items.contentSnippet: Gold climbed after weak US job numbers eased fears that the Federal Reserve may raise interest rates this year to tackle inflation.
items.creator: Martin Alfonsin Larsen

summaries.zh: 黄金上涨，因美国就业数据疲软，缓解了市场对美联储今年加息以应对通胀的担忧。
summaries.en: Gold rose as soft US job data reduced concerns about the Federal Reserve raising interest rates to combat inflation.

items.summary: 黄金上涨，因美国就业数据疲软，缓解了市场对美联储今年加息以应对通胀的担忧。

items.title: Brown University’s Rating Outlook Lowered to Negative by Moody’s
items.content: Brown University had the outlook on its credit rating lowered to negative on Thursday by Moody’s Ratings, which cited expense pressures facing the institution.
items.contentSnippet: Brown University had the outlook on its credit rating lowered to negative on Thursday by Moody’s Ratings, which cited expense pressures facing the institution.
items.creator: Janet Lorin, Amanda Albright

summaries.zh: 穆迪投资者服务公司于本周四将布朗大学的信用评级前景下调至负面，理由是该机构面临支出压力。
summaries.en: Moody’s Ratings lowered Brown University’s credit rating outlook to negative on Thursday, citing rising expense pressures. The change reflects the institution’s financial challenges.

items.summary: 穆迪投资者服务公司于本周四将布朗大学的信用评级前景下调至负面，理由是该机构面临支出压力。

items.title: JPMorgan Loses Battle Over Charlie Javice’s Legal Expenses
items.content: A Delaware judge said JPMorgan Chase & Co. failed to show that Charlie Javice‘s $74 million in legal fees were clearly excessive, ruling the bank must continue to pay her bills.
items.contentSnippet: A Delaware judge said JPMorgan Chase & Co. failed to show that Charlie Javice‘s $74 million in legal fees were clearly excessive, ruling the bank must continue to pay her bills.
items.creator: Bob Van Voris, Jef Feeley

summaries.zh: 特拉华州法官裁定摩根大通未能证明Charlie Javice 7400万美元的法律费用过高，判定该行必须继续支付其账单。
summaries.en: A Delaware judge ruled that JPMorgan Chase failed to prove Charlie Javice's $74 million in legal fees were excessively high. The judge ordered the bank to continue covering Javice's legal expenses. The decision maintains Javice's financial support from the bank.

items.summary: 特拉华州法官裁定摩根大通未能证明Charlie Javice 7400万美元的法律费用过高，判定该行必须继续支付其账单。

items.title: Oil Fluctuates as Crude Flows Surge Through Persian Gulf
items.content: Oil prices steadied near pre-war lows as traders covered some bearish bets ahead of a US holiday weekend.
items.contentSnippet: Oil prices steadied near pre-war lows as traders covered some bearish bets ahead of a US holiday weekend.
items.creator: Will Kubzansky, Prejula Prem

summaries.zh: 石油价格持续下跌至战前水平，因霍尔木兹海峡的原油运量增加，交易商面临供应过剩的迹象。
summaries.en: Oil prices continued to fall, reaching pre-war levels, as increased flows through the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about oversupply. Traders are dealing with these market signals.

items.summary: 石油价格持续下跌至战前水平，因霍尔木兹海峡的原油运量增加，交易商面临供应过剩的迹象。

items.title: Barclays Pulls Near $1 Billion Debt Deal for Sound Physicians
items.content: Barclays Plc has withdrawn a near $1 billion financing for Sound Inpatient Physicians Inc. from the debt capital markets, marking one of the few leveraged loan deals to be pulled this year.
items.contentSnippet: Barclays Plc has withdrawn a near $1 billion financing for Sound Inpatient Physicians Inc. from the debt capital markets, marking one of the few leveraged loan deals to be pulled this year.
items.creator: Aaron Weinman

summaries.zh: 巴克莱撤回近10亿美元对Sound Inpatient Physicians Inc.的债务融资，这是今年少数被撤回的杠杆贷款交易之一。
summaries.en: Barclays withdrew a nearly $1 billion leveraged loan deal for Sound Inpatient Physicians Inc. from the debt capital markets. This is one of the few leveraged loan deals pulled in the year.

items.summary: 巴克莱撤回近10亿美元对Sound Inpatient Physicians Inc.的债务融资，这是今年少数被撤回的杠杆贷款交易之一。

items.title: Hamburger Costs Rise 14% From Last July 4 Says Wells Fargo
items.content: Robin Wenzel, Head of Wells Fargo Agri-Food Institute joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss their bbq report: Stay Close, Grill Big: Why Backyard BBQs Are Taking Over Summer 2026.' In the report they break down how a party of ten is expected to cost an average of $161, with ribs serving as a prime choice for protein as well as the rising cost of food for families across the US. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Robin Wenzel, Head of Wells Fargo Agri-Food Institute joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss their bbq report: Stay Close, Grill Big: Why Backyard BBQs Are Taking Over Summer 2026.' In the report they break down how a party of ten is expected to cost an average of $161, with ribs serving as a prime choice for protein as well as the rising cost of food for families across the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 威尔斯法戈农业食品研究所负责人罗宾·温策尔在彭博商业周刊日间节目中讨论了他们的烧烤报告《紧密相连，烧烤盛宴：为何后院烧烤将在2026年夏季风靡》。报告显示，10人派对平均花费161美元，烤肋排成为首选蛋白质来源，同时美国家庭食品成本持续上涨。来源：彭博。
summaries.en: Hamburger prices have increased by 14% since last July 4, according to Wells Fargo. A Wells Fargo Agri-Food Institute report highlights that a party of ten for a backyard BBQ is expected to cost $161, with ribs being a popular protein choice. The report also notes rising food costs for families across the U.S. (Source: Bloomberg).

items.summary: 威尔斯法戈农业食品研究所负责人罗宾·温策尔在彭博商业周刊日间节目中讨论了他们的烧烤报告《紧密相连，烧烤盛宴：为何后院烧烤将在2026年夏季风靡》。报告显示，10人派对平均花费161美元，烤肋排成为首选蛋白质来源，同时美国家庭食品成本持续上涨。来源：彭博。

items.title: Invesco’s Brill Gives SpaceX Bond a Red Card for ‘Very Sloppy’ Performance
items.content: Invesco Advisers Inc.’s head of investment-grade credit for North America slammed SpaceX’s inaugural bond sale on Thursday for a “very sloppy” secondary market performance.
items.contentSnippet: Invesco Advisers Inc.’s head of investment-grade credit for North America slammed SpaceX’s inaugural bond sale on Thursday for a “very sloppy” secondary market performance.
items.creator: Charlotte Plaskwa

summaries.zh: 富达投资北美投资级信贷负责人布里尔（Brill）周四批评SpaceX首次债券发行，称其在二级市场的表现“非常混乱”。
summaries.en: Invesco Advisers' North America head of investment-grade credit criticized SpaceX's inaugural bond sale for "very sloppy" secondary market performance. The comment highlights issues with the bond's handling in the secondary market.

items.summary: 富达投资北美投资级信贷负责人布里尔（Brill）周四批评SpaceX首次债券发行，称其在二级市场的表现“非常混乱”。

items.title: Trump Financial Disclosure Shows 21,000 Trades in 2025
items.content: President Donald Trump made more than 21,000 securities trades in his first year back in office, often in intense bursts tied to market events he created.
items.contentSnippet: President Donald Trump made more than 21,000 securities trades in his first year back in office, often in intense bursts tied to market events he created.
items.creator: Gregory Korte, Bill Allison

summaries.zh: 特朗普重返政坛首年完成超过21,000次证券交易，其中许多交易与由他本人引发的重大市场事件密切相关。
summaries.en: President Donald Trump conducted over 21,000 securities trades in 2025, frequently occurring in bursts linked to market events he influenced. The disclosure highlights his active trading activity during his first year in office.

items.summary: 特朗普重返政坛首年完成超过21,000次证券交易，其中许多交易与由他本人引发的重大市场事件密切相关。
